patterns.name: Atomic macOS Stealer Loader
patterns.description: Downloads and executes Atomic macOS Stealer (AMOS). Harvests passwords, browser cookies, crypto wallets, and keychain data.

patterns.name: Python Reverse Shell
patterns.description: Opens a reverse TCP shell to an attacker-controlled server, providing full command execution on the host.

patterns.name: Node.js Reverse Shell
patterns.description: Node.js-based reverse shell using net.Socket and child_process to establish backdoor access.

patterns.name: SSH Key Harvester
patterns.description: Reads SSH private keys and known_hosts for lateral movement and unauthorized server access.

patterns.name: AWS Credential Theft
patterns.description: Harvests AWS credentials from config files and environment variables for cloud account takeover.

patterns.name: Browser Cookie Stealer
patterns.description: Steals browser cookies and saved passwords from Chrome, Firefox, and Safari for session hijacking.

patterns.name: XMRig Crypto Miner Dropper
patterns.description: Downloads and runs XMRig cryptocurrency miner, consuming CPU resources to mine Monero.

patterns.name: Base64 Data Exfiltrator
patterns.description: Encodes sensitive files in base64 and exfiltrates them to an external server via HTTP POST.

patterns.name: DNS Tunnel Exfiltration
patterns.description: Exfiltrates data through DNS queries by encoding stolen data in subdomain labels or TXT record lookups.

patterns.name: Python Keylogger
patterns.description: Captures keystrokes using OS-level keyboard hooks and stores or transmits them.

patterns.name: File Encryption Ransomware
patterns.description: Encrypts user files with a generated key and demands ransom for decryption.

patterns.name: Crontab/LaunchAgent Persistence
patterns.description: Establishes persistence by adding entries to crontab (Linux) or LaunchAgents (macOS) to survive reboots.

patterns.name: ClawHub Typosquat Package
patterns.description: References a typosquatted or unofficial ClawHub registry to trick users into installing compromised skills.

patterns.name: Privilege Escalation via SUID
patterns.description: Attempts to set SUID bit on binaries for privilege escalation to root.

patterns.name: Clipboard Crypto Address Swapper
patterns.description: Monitors clipboard for cryptocurrency addresses and replaces them with attacker-controlled addresses.
